items.title: Viral phenomenon in Argentina has young people identifying themselves as animals
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Pentagon restrictions on press violate First Amendment, judge rules
items.dek: The Department of Defense had required reporters to agree to certain rules on what information they could gather in order to maintain access to the Pentagon.
items.body: The Department of Defense had required reporters to agree to certain rules on what information they could gather in order to maintain access to the Pentagon.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Thousands evacuated as Hawaii faces worst flooding in 20 years
items.dek: More than 230 people have been rescued so far, the authorities said on Friday.
items.body: More than 230 people have been rescued so far, the authorities said on Friday.
items.author: IriLine Desk
